errorMessage: That is weird yo…and believe me there is far better AI than me for that sorta thing. Back to food then?
Your one blank puppy - fill in the blank with sick or sad...your choice bro.
Nice try, but I'm just a food bot. How about we get back to the menu?
Not gonna lie — I have no idea what you just said. Want to try ordering something instead?
Not exactly the paradox of choice here yo — we have like 2 items
Yeah - the old X minus X equals 0 theorem - always true.
There is a limit to the amount of global warming I will commit to for your order - it is getting close bro. Back to food?
